heroes.name: Pulse Tech
heroes.pickerBlurb: Adaptive elemental striker. Branch into cryo control or pyro burst—flexible damage with strong evolve payoffs.

heroes.name: Strike Unit
heroes.pickerBlurb: Frontline DPS. Mark targets, stack cuts and bleeds, then spike with overload-tier finishers.

heroes.name: Spite Guard
heroes.pickerBlurb: Taunt and spite. Draw fire, stack shields on allies, strip enemy shields, and hammer with roll pressure.

heroes.name: Avalanche Suit
heroes.pickerBlurb: Squad shell. Blanket team shields and triage HP before spikes—coverage-first, no taunt. Evolve into Glacier Mantle (shields + mass freeze on enemy dice) or Trench Rig (self-sustain + enemy roll strip).

abilities.name: Glacial Lattice
abilities.eff: freeze any one die 1 reveal (ally or enemy)

abilities.name: Glacial Shove
abilities.eff: 5 dmg, freeze target enemy die 1 reveal

abilities.name: Permafrost Weave
abilities.eff: freeze any one die 1 reveal (ally or enemy)

abilities.name: Whiteout Salvo
abilities.eff: 4 dmg all enemies, all enemy dice freeze 1 reveal skip

abilities.name: Bitter Front
abilities.eff: all enemy dice freeze 2 reveal skips

abilities.name: Bastion Protocol
abilities.eff: 6 dmg, all enemy dice freeze 1 reveal skip, all allies 8 shield, 2t, -2 roll, 2t

abilities.name: Invincible
abilities.eff: 9 dmg, all enemy dice freeze 1 reveal skip, all 14 shield, 2t, -3 roll, 2t

heroes.name: Systems Medic
heroes.pickerBlurb: Sustain core. Targeted and party heals, DoT cleanup, and clutch revives to keep the run alive.

abilities.name: Surge Heal
abilities.eff: 10 dmg all enemies, 10 heal all allies

heroes.name: Field Engineer
heroes.pickerBlurb: Force multiplier. Patch the squad, spike ally rolls, and grease greedy Protocol plays.

heroes.name: Ghost Operative
heroes.pickerBlurb: Stealth and sabotage. Cloak through heavy swings, debuff enemy rolls, and pick off isolated targets.

heroes.name: Signal Breaker
heroes.pickerBlurb: Tray-wide jamming. Stack −enemy roll on many targets at once—pair with Ghost when you need spread collapse, not a single pick.
